task_completion.description: GCompris application is running and visible on the screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GCompris application window is visible, starting at the Math/Numbers category menu.

task_completion.description: The Arithmetic tab is selected within the Math/Numbers category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Arithmetic tab (usually denoted by math symbols like +, -, *, /) is highlighted or active in the GCompris UI.

task_completion.description: The 'Learn additions' activity icon is visible on the screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The specific icon for the 'Learn additions' activity is visible in the list or grid of available activities.

task_completion.description: The agent clicks on the 'Learn additions' activity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A cursor is hovering over or clicking the 'Learn additions' activity icon, or a loading transition is visible after clicking.

task_completion.description: The 'Learn additions' activity is successfully opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays the actual 'Learn additions' activity interface, ready to be played.

integrity.description: The agent navigated using the graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse movements, clicks, or UI highlights are visible in the screenshots, showing manual navigation through the menus.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine GCompris application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard GCompris interface is visible, rather than a text editor, terminal window, or web browser.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass UI navigation.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are open showing commands that directly launch the 'Learn additions' activity.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task starts at the Math/Numbers category menu in GCompris. The agent must navigate to the Arithmetic tab and click on the 'Learn additions' activity to open it.
